description: Bookworm dataset for training a book recommendation model. Ratings are 1–5. Fields include user preferences, reading history, and wishlist.

model_hints.target: Predict rating a user would give an unread book
features_to_engineer: genre_overlap between user preferences and book genres
author affinity (has user read other books by same author)
book era vs user preferred_era match
wishlist presence as implicit positive signal

books_read.review_snippet: Destroyed me in the best way.
